profile.name: Liam Chen
profile.summary: Recent software engineering graduate with three years of combined internship and part-time experience in Python backend development, data pipelines, and REST API design. Passionate about building clean, maintainable systems and eager to contribute to a collaborative engineering team.

experiences.title: Software Engineering Intern
experiences.description: Worked within the Bitbucket Pipelines team to improve CI/CD performance metrics. Implemented a caching layer for pipeline artefacts using Python and AWS S3, reducing average build times by 22%. Contributed to code reviews and participated in Agile sprint ceremonies.

experiences.title: Junior Data Analyst
experiences.description: Maintained and extended a suite of Power BI dashboards tracking hospital bed occupancy and patient wait times across 12 facilities. Wrote SQL queries against a PostgreSQL data warehouse and built Python scripts to automate weekly report generation, saving approximately 4 hours per week of manual work.

experiences.title: Final Year Capstone — Smart Campus App
experiences.description: Led a team of four to design and build a full-stack web application allowing students to locate and book quiet study rooms in real time. Backend built with FastAPI and SQLAlchemy on PostgreSQL; frontend with React and TypeScript; containerised with Docker and deployed to a university-managed server.
